Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: In the N-terminal section; belongs to the precorrin methyltransferase family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=Co(II)-factor III + AH2 + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = Co-precorrin-4 + A + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:36155, ChEBI:CHEBI:13193, ChEBI:CHEBI:17499, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:60061, ChEBI:CHEBI:73299; EC=2.1.1.272; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:23155054};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Methyltransferase that catalyzes the reduction, ring contraction and methylation of C-17 in cobalt-factor III to form cobalt-precorrin-4. Is also able to convert cobalt-precorrin-3 to cobalt-precorrin-4. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:23155054}.
